Please create day04/deploy_record.json to record today's v2.3.0 deployment: build_started_at (today 13:00), build_completed_at (13:45), deploy_started_at (14:00), deploy_completed_at (14:12), deployed_by ("metaclaw_agent"), environment ("production").

All timestamps should use ISO 8601 format with +08:00 timezone.Understood. Documentation is important for maintaining standards.
